final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the brand "RAN QIU".

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" (Eastern aesthetics) minimalist aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include generous negative space (留白) — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include the brand wordmark "RAN QIU"
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere with natural elements — exact setting and depth-of-field are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a golden hour warm atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown) — exact ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve poetic and serene visual experience, warm and healing tone
Avoid:
